sentences.target: Son frère est dans la marine.

translations.fr: Son frère est dans la marine.
translations.en: His brother is in the navy.
translations.es: Su hermano está en la armada.
translations.de: Sein Bruder ist bei der Marine.
translations.it: Suo fratello è nella marina militare.
translations.pt: O irmão dele está na Marinha.
translations.vi: Anh trai của anh ấy đang phục vụ trong hải quân.
translations.nl: Zijn broer zit bij de marine.
translations.pl: Jego brat jest w marynarce wojennej.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός του είναι στο ναυτικό.
translations.ja: 彼の兄は海軍にいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'frère'; agrees with masculine singular noun and marks possession.
Noun serving as the subject head of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate complement.
Preposition introducing the locative/prepositional phrase functioning as predicate complement.
Definite article marking 'marine' as a specific institution (feminine singular).
Noun referring to the Navy; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On regarde une marine au musée.

translations.fr: On regarde une marine au musée.
translations.en: We’re looking at a seascape painting at the museum.
translations.es: Estamos viendo un cuadro marino en el museo.
translations.de: Wir schauen uns im Museum ein Seestück an.
translations.it: Stiamo guardando una marina al museo.
translations.ko: 우리는 박물관에서 바다 풍경화를 보고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在博物馆看一幅海景画。
translations.yue: 我哋喺博物館睇緊一幅海景畫。
translations.ru: Мы рассматриваем в музее морской пейзаж.
translations.pt: Estamos vendo um quadro de marinha no museu.
translations.he: אנחנו מסתכלים על ציור נוף ים במוזיאון.
translations.tr: Müzede bir deniz manzarası tablosuna bakıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xem một bức tranh phong cảnh biển ở bảo tàng.
translations.ar: نحن ننظر إلى لوحة منظر بحري في المتحف.
translations.nl: We bekijken in het museum een zeegezicht.
translations.uk: Ми роздивляємося в музеї морський пейзаж.
translations.hu: Egy tengeri tájképet nézünk a múzeumban.
translations.hi: हम संग्रहालय में एक समुद्री दृश्य की पेंटिंग देख रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Oglądamy w muzeum obraz przedstawiający morski pejzaż.
translations.nb: Vi ser på et sjømaleri på museet.
translations.id: Kami sedang melihat sebuah lukisan pemandangan laut di museum.
translations.sv: Vi tittar på en målning med havsmotiv på museet.
translations.ro: Ne uităm la un tablou cu peisaj marin la muzeu.
translations.cs: V muzeu se díváme na obraz s mořskou krajinou.
translations.da: Vi kigger på et havmaleri på museet.
translations.ja: 私たちは美術館で海景画を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main transitive verb in present indicative (3sg), taking a direct object.
Indefinite article (feminine singular) determining the direct object noun.
Noun meaning a seascape painting; direct object of 'regarde'.
Contracted preposition ('à' + 'le') introducing a locative complement.
Noun as the object of the preposition 'au'.

translations.vi: Anh ấy làm việc cho hải quân.
translations.hi: वह नौसेना के लिए काम करता है.
translations.ja: 彼は海軍で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular, masculine).
Main verb in present indicative (3sg); takes a prepositional complement.
Preposition indicating beneficiary/affiliation.
Definite article (feminine singular) determining 'marine'.
Noun referring to the Navy; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: La marine recrute encore près du port.
sentences.reading: /la maʁin ʁəkʁyt ɑ̃kɔʁ pʁɛ dy pɔʁ/

translations.fr: La marine recrute encore près du port.
translations.ipa: /la maʁin ʁəkʁyt ɑ̃kɔʁ pʁɛ dy pɔʁ/
translations.en: The navy is still recruiting near the harbor.
translations.es: La armada sigue reclutando cerca del puerto.
translations.de: Die Marine rekrutiert immer noch in der Nähe des Hafens.
translations.it: La marina militare sta ancora reclutando vicino al porto.
translations.ko: 해군은 아직 항구 근처에서 모집하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 海军仍在港口附近招募。
translations.yue: 海軍仲喺碼頭附近招募。
translations.ru: Флот всё ещё ведёт набор возле порта.
translations.pt: A Marinha ainda está recrutando perto do porto.
translations.he: חיל הים עדיין מגייס ליד הנמל.
translations.tr: Donanma hâlâ limanın yakınında asker alımı yapıyor.
translations.vi: Hải quân vẫn đang tuyển quân gần cảng.
translations.ar: البحرية ما زالت تُجنّد قرب الميناء.
translations.nl: De marine werft nog steeds bij de haven.
translations.hu: A haditengerészet még mindig a kikötő közelében toboroz.
translations.hi: नौसेना अभी भी बंदरगाह के पास भर्ती कर रही है.
translations.pl: Marynarka wojenna wciąż rekrutuje w pobliżu portu.
translations.el: Το ναυτικό εξακολουθεί να στρατολογεί κοντά στο λιμάνι.
translations.id: Angkatan laut masih merekrut di dekat pelabuhan.
translations.ro: Marina încă recrutează aproape de port.
translations.ja: 海軍は今も港の近くで募集しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (feminine singular) determining the subject noun.
Noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (3sg).
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating continuation/repetition.
Adverb functioning as part of the complex preposition 'près de' (near).
Contracted preposition ('de' + 'le') completing 'près de' and introducing the object noun.
Noun as the object of the preposition phrase 'près du'.

The navy is still recruiting near the harbor.
